import React, {useState, useRef} from 'react' import styled from 'styled-components' import Checkbox from './Checkbox' import Search from './static/search.png' import {useDispatch, useSelector} from 'react-redux' import { openDepartment, openCategory, openMenswearTop, openMenswearBottoms, openMenswearOuterwear, openMenswearFootwear, openMenswearTailoring, openMenswearAccessories, openWomenswearTop, openWomenswearBottoms, openWomenswearOuterwear, openWomenswearFootwear, openWomenswearDresses, openWomenswearAccessories, openWomenswearBagsAndLugguage, openSize, openPrice, openCondition, shopSelector } from '../redux/shopSlice' //import CheckBoxesWrapper from './CheckBoxesWrapper' //import SidebarTitles from './SidebarTitles' import DepartmentWrapper from './DepartmentWrapper' const SidebarWrapper = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:center; width:100%; ` const SidebarTitles = styled.div ` font-size:1.2rem; font-weight:700; ` const SeparationBar = styled.div ` width:100%; background-color:#BDC0BA; height:1px; ` const MenswearTitle = styled.div ` font-wieght:900; font-size:1rem; margin-left:-15px; ` const MenswearSection = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; margin-left:40px; ` const WomenswearSection = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; margin-left:40px; ` const Catogories = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; ` const Category = styled.div ` margin:7px 0; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; width:100%; ` const CheckboxesWrapper = styled.div ` display:none; flex-direction:column; margin-left:20px; ` const Name = styled.div ` font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:500; ` const Arrow = styled.div ` width:10px; height:10px; background-color:#1C1C1C; -webkit-clip-path:polygon(0 40%, 50% 85%, 100% 40%, 100% 55%, 50% 100%, 0 55%); ` const DesignerSearchbarWrapper = styled.div ` position:relative; margin:20px 0; display:flex; align-items:center; margin-left:20px; ` const DesignerSearchBar = styled.input ` width:80%; height:30px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid grey; ` const SearchImage = styled.div ` background-image:url(${Search }); width:15px; height:15px; background-position:center; background-size:cover; position:absolute; margin-left:10px; background-color:white; ` const PriceSection = styled.div ` display:flex; justify-content:center; align-items:center; margin:20px 0; ` const MinPrice = styled.input ` margin-right:10px; width:70px; height:25px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid grey; ` const MaxPrice = styled.input ` margin-left:10px; width:70px; height:25px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid grey; ` const open = { 'display':'flex' } const CheckBoxesWrapper = styled.div ` display:flex; flex-direction:column; margin-left:20px; ` export default function Sidebar () { const dispatch = useDispatch() const sidebarSelect = useSelector(shopSelector) const handleDepartmentClick = () => { dispatch(openDepartment()) } const handleMTopClick = () => { dispatch(openMenswearTop()) } const handleMBottomsClick = () => { dispatch(openMenswearBottoms()) } const handleMOuterwearClick = () => { dispatch(openMenswearOuterwear()) } const handleMFootwearClick = () => { dispatch(openMenswearFootwear()) } const handleMTailoringClick = () => { dispatch(openMenswearTailoring()) } const handleMAccessoriesClick = () => { dispatch(openMenswearAccessories()) } const handleWTopClick = () => { dispatch(openWomenswearTop()) } const handleWBottomsClick = () => { dispatch(openWomenswearBottoms()) } return ( Department { sidebarSelect.sidebar.department ? Menswear Womenswear : null} Category Menswear Top { !sidebarSelect.sidebar.menswear.top ? All Tops Long Sleeve T-shirts Shirts Sweaters & Knitwear Sweatshirts & Hoodies TankTop & Sleeveless Jerseys :null} Bottoms { sidebarSelect.sidebar.menswear.bottoms ? All Bottoms Casual Pants Cropped Pants Denim Leggings Overalls & Jumpsuits Shorts Sweatpants & Joggers Swimwear :null} OuterWear { sidebarSelect.sidebar.menswear.outerwear ? All Outerwear Bombers Cloaks & Capes Denim Jackets Heavy Coats Leather Jackets Light Jackets Parkas Raincoats Vests :null} Footwear { sidebarSelect.sidebar.menswear.footwear ? All Footwear Boots Casual Leather Shoes Formal Shoes Hi-Top Sneakers Low-Top Sneakers Sandals Slip Ons :null} Tailoring { sidebarSelect.sidebar.menswear.tailoring ? All Tailoring Blazers Formal Shirting Formal Trousers :null} Accessories { sidebarSelect.sidebar.menswear.accessories ? All Accessories Bags & Luggage Belts Glasses Gloves & Scarves Hats Jewelry & Watches Wallets Sunglasses :null} Womenswear Top { sidebarSelect.sidebar.womenswear.top ? All Tops Crop Tops Bodysuits Long Sleeve T-shirts Shirts Sweaters Sweatshirts & Hoodies TankTop & Sleeveless Jerseys :null} Bottoms { sidebarSelect.sidebar.womenswear.bottoms ? All Bottoms Casual Pants Joggers Jeans Leggings Jumpsuits Shorts Sweatpants & Joggers Maxi Skirts Midi Skirts Mini Skirts :null} OuterWear All Outerwear Blazer Denim Jackets Coats Jackets Vests Footwear All Footwear Boots Heels Low-Top Sneakers Sandals Flats Dresses All Dresses Maxi Dresses Midi Dresses Mini Dresses Accessories All Accessories Belts Glasses Gloves & Scarves Hats Jewelry & Watches Wallets Sunglasses Scarves Bags & Lugguage All Bags & Lugguage Crossbody Bags Handle Bags Shoulder Bags Tote Bags Size XXS XS S M L XL XXL Designer XXS XS S M L XL XXL Price
to
 Condition New / Never Worn Gently Used Used Very Worn ) }
